generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a great discussion about strategic autonomy! It's so important that we balance national security with civil liberties. My friend who works in defense says we can't rely on others forever - we need to invest in our own capabilities. But we should do it smartly, respecting our values. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
